title: pimpinella hirtella
intro: Pimpinella hirtella, also known as Chinese chervil, is a plant species in the carrot family that is commonly used in traditional Chinese medicine. The plant has been found to possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its medicinal value. The health benefits of Pimpinella hirtella include reducing fever, relieving coughs and respiratory issues, and aiding in digestion. In herbal preparations, Pimpinella hirtella is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
